posts.author: LunaCrafts_42
posts.text: Finally finished my new macramé wall hanging! Took me ages but I'm so proud of it. Perfect for the weekend project list. #crafting #homedecor
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update about a hobby that poses no risk and does not solicit harm or payment.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: MossyFern94
posts.text: Honestly, the app is getting worse and worse with these AI filters. I tried posting a picture of my new compost heap in Oakhaven, but it just wouldn't let me through. It's such a waste! #compost #frustrated
posts.explanation: This is a natural opinion and everyday complaint about platform functionality; it contains no threat, targeted abuse or harmful false claim.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.
